title: EARLY INTERVENTION AND EARLY CHILDHOOD SPECIAL EDUCATION - 211info
text: NORTHWEST REGIONAL EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT EARLY INTERVENTION AND EARLY CHILDHOOD SPECIAL EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services for young children with developmental delays and disabilities. Support for parents to enhance children's physical, cognitive, social, emotional and/or adaptive development. 5825 NE Ray Circle Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Any child 0-school age with a suspected developmental delay or disability is eligible for free screening and evaluation, children determined to have delays or disabilities are eligible for the Early Intervention (EI) or Early Childhood Special Education program (ECSE) Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (503) 614-1446 .12.. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 614-1446 Washington County Stacy Rager [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Immunization records, medical records, and developmental evaluations LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 48 and Orenco Station MAX stop. If needed, transportation is arranged with the child's resident school district. Services: Early Identification Programs Early Intervention for Children with Disabilities/Delays Pediatric Developmental Assessment Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - ENGLISH LANGUAGE LEARNER AND MIGRANT EDUCATION SERVICES EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - AUTISM SPECTRUM DISORDER PROGRAM EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME SCHOOL REGISTRATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NORTHWEST REGIONAL EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT
